title: 100% FDI in Insurance: What rule says? What will be its impact?
summary: The Finance Ministry has approved 100% foreign direct investment in the insurance sector under the automatic route, with a 20% cap for LIC. This reform aims to enhance technology and product design, addressing India's insurance penetration gap and improving affordability and distribution.

summary: Emergency fund rules help households build financial resilience. It is imperative to maintain 3–6 months' expenses, keeping funds separate, prioritising liquidity, starting small, refilling after use, and reviewing annually for stability.&nbsp;

summary: The strategy to improve a credit score below 650 focuses on timely EMI payments, reducing credit utilisation, limiting loan applications, clearing high-interest debts, maintaining old accounts, and regularly monitoring credit reports for accuracy.

title: Safe personal loan EMI on ₹30,000 salary: Simple budgeting tips explained
summary: Understanding borrowing fundamentals is vital for personal loans. Keeping EMIs at 20-25% of income ensures financial stability. High EMIs risk missed payments, which negatively impact credit scores. Seek professional advice for sustainable financial planning.
